figure.title: Sideband Data Link Physical Connections
figure.purpose: Shows the physical connectivity for the sideband (UART) data link over the physical medium.

technical_summary: Each node's Data Link layer contains a UART TXB (Transmit Buffer) and UART RXB (Receive Buffer).
These buffers connect to the Physical Layer SERDES.
The physical medium cross-connects the nodes: the UART TXB of one node connects to the UART RXB of the other node.

components.name: PHYSICAL MEDIUM
components.description: The interconnect carrying the sideband signals.

critical_facts: The sideband channel relies on standard crossover UART connections implemented over the Physical Layer SERDES.
